settings.heading:
From the Mountains
of Morocco
to the World
settings.subheading: Curated luxury smoking accessories. Crafted for those who appreciate ritual.

settings.heading: Curated Ritual Bundles
settings.subheading: Every object chosen with intention. Every set a statement.

settings.heading:
Born from Moroccan Tradition.
Refined for the Modern World.
settings.body: La Mamma's Signature was born at the crossroads of ancient Moroccan craftsmanship and contemporary luxury. Each piece in our collection is a marriage of material and meaning — designed not merely to be used, but to be owned, displayed, and passed on.

settings.title: Heritage
settings.text: Rooted in Moroccan tradition, elevated to global luxury.

settings.title: Craftsmanship
settings.text: Premium materials. Meticulous construction. Zero compromise.

settings.title: Collectible
settings.text: Limited runs. Numbered sets. Objects that hold their value.

settings.heading: The Unboxing Experience
settings.body: Every La Mamma's Signature order arrives in a custom-designed box — black matte with gold foil stamping, tissue-wrapped, and sealed with our signature wax emblem.

settings.review_text: Absolutely premium quality. The ritual set arrived beautifully packaged — felt like unboxing a luxury item.
Finally a brand that takes smoking accessories seriously. The tray is a piece of art on my desk.
The packaging alone is a statement. Gifted it to a close friend — he was speechless.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: We ship worldwide. Orders to Morocco and the Middle East typically arrive within 3–5 business days. International shipping is 7–14 business days.

settings.question: Are the sets limited edition?
settings.answer: Yes. Our Signature sets are produced in small, numbered batches. Once a batch sells out, it may not return.

settings.question: Can I order via WhatsApp?
settings.answer: Absolutely. Message us for a private, assisted buying experience.

settings.question: What is included in a Ritual Set?
settings.answer: Each Signature Ritual Set includes a premium rolling tray, a precision grinder, a luxury lighter, a leather pouch, and storage solutions — all curated as a cohesive collection.

settings.heading: Prefer a Private Order Experience?
settings.body: Our team is available to assist you personally via WhatsApp. Secure your set, ask questions, or request a custom configuration.
settings.whatsapp_message: Hello, I'd like to order from La Mamma's Signature.
